changes.value:
The frontend needs two things from the backend:
1. Every mutation command returns an operation/transaction ULID so the client can track it in its undo stack
2. `undo_operation` and `redo_operation` Tauri commands that accept a ULID

## Changes

### All mutation Tauri commands return ULID
Currently mutation commands return domain-specific results (e.g. AddTask returns the new task JSON). They need to ALSO return the operation ULID. Options:
- Wrap all results in `{ result: <domain data>, operation_id: "<ulid>" }`
- Or add operation_id as a top-level field on the existing result JSON

### New Tauri commands
```rust
#[tauri::command]
async fn undo_operation(state: State<'_, AppState>, id: String) -> Result<Value>

#[tauri::command]  
async fn redo_operation(state: State<'_, AppState>, id: String) -> Result<Value>
```

These delegate to EntityContext::undo/redo for single-entity ops, or KanbanContext transaction undo/redo for compound ops.

### Remove convenience wrapper commands
As discussed, remove `update_task_title`, `update_task_description`, `rename_column` â€” everything routes through `update_entity_field` which returns the operation ULID.

## Files
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban-app/src/commands.rs` â€” add undo/redo commands, update mutation commands to return ULIDs, remove convenience wrappers
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban-app/ui/src/App.tsx` â€” update invoke calls to use `update_entity_field` instead of removed wrappers

## Checklist
- [ ] Add `undo_operation` Tauri command
- [ ] Add `redo_operation` Tauri command
- [ ] Update all mutation commands to return operation ULID in result
- [ ] Remove `update_task_title` command (use `update_entity_field`)
- [ ] Remove `update_task_description` command (use `update_entity_field`)
- [ ] Remove `rename_column` command (use `update_entity_field`)
- [ ] Update frontend invoke calls for removed commands
- [ ] Test undo/redo round-trip through Tauri IPC
- [ ] Run full test suite
Expose undo/redo as Tauri commands, return operation ULIDs from mutations

@@ -2,26 +2,27 @@
 1. Every mutation command returns an operation/transaction ULID so the client can track it in its undo stack
 2. `undo_operation` and `redo_operation` Tauri commands that accept a ULID

+## Return format
+Add `operation_id` as a top-level field on the existing result JSON for all mutation commands. No envelope wrapper â€” just mix it into the domain result object.
+
 ## Changes

 ### All mutation Tauri commands return ULID
-Currently mutation commands return domain-specific results (e.g. AddTask returns the new task JSON). They need to ALSO return the operation ULID. Options:
-- Wrap all results in `{ result: <domain data>, operation_id: "<ulid>" }`
-- Or add operation_id as a top-level field on the existing result JSON
+Add `operation_id: "<ulid>"` to every mutation result JSON.

 ### New Tauri commands
 ```rust
 #[tauri::command]
-async fn undo_operation(state: State<'_, AppState>, id: String) -> Result<Value>
+async fn undo_operation(state: State<'_, AppState>, id: String) -> Result<Value, String>

 #[tauri::command]  
-async fn redo_operation(state: State<'_, AppState>, id: String) -> Result<Value>
+async fn redo_operation(state: State<'_, AppState>, id: String) -> Result<Value, String>
 ```

-These delegate to EntityContext::undo/redo for single-entity ops, or KanbanContext transaction undo/redo for compound ops.
+These delegate to EntityContext::undo/redo which handles both single-entity ops and transactions.

 ### Remove convenience wrapper commands
-As discussed, remove `update_task_title`, `update_task_description`, `rename_column` â€” everything routes through `update_entity_field` which returns the operation ULID.
+Remove `update_task_title`, `update_task_description`, `rename_column` â€” everything routes through `update_entity_field` which returns the operation ULID.

 ## Files
 - `swissarmyhammer-kanban-app/src/commands.rs` â€” add undo/redo commands, update mutation commands to return ULIDs, remove convenience wrappers
@@ -30,7 +31,7 @@

 - [ ] Add `undo_operation` Tauri command
 - [ ] Add `redo_operation` Tauri command
-- [ ] Update all mutation commands to return operation ULID in result
+- [ ] Update all mutation commands to include operation_id in result JSON
 - [ ] Remove `update_task_title` command (use `update_entity_field`)
 - [ ] Remove `update_task_description` command (use `update_entity_field`)
 - [ ] Remove `rename_column` command (use `update_entity_field`)
